name: TopK-Proportional
description: Baseline: buy top-K stocks proportional to predicted return, long-only

name: TopK-Threshold
description: Buy top-K only when pred_ret > threshold (1%), long-only

name: TopK-StopLoss
description: TopK with stop-loss if daily realized loss exceeds threshold

name: LongShort-Equal
description: Long top-10% and short bottom-10%, equal weight each side

name: Momentum-Filter
description: Buy top-K only when predicted return is above its short-term moving average

name: Risk-Parity
description: Among top-K, weight inversely by recent realized volatility

name: BottomK-Reversal
description: Long bottom-K (losers), short top-K (winners) - classic reversal

name: Confidence-Sized
description: Weight by absolute predicted return (confidence), long-only

name: Sector-Neutral
description: Equal-weight long/short portfolio with net-zero sector exposure

name: Dual-Threshold
description: Long when pred > 2%, short when pred < -1%, top-K each side
